speaker: charlie
text: G'day, I'm Alex Mercer and it's Friday, May first, a stunner of a start to May here in South East Queensland. Beautiful autumn weather continues with warm dry days ahead.

speaker: alice
text: And I'm Jamie, bringing you the bright side of today's news! We've got some incredible science stories today - from ocean tech that's pulling carbon out of the air to sound waves that can put out fires in milliseconds.

speaker: charlie
text: That sound wave fire fighting tech is bonkers mate. NASA engineers creating a device that uses pure sound to knock out flames faster than you can say bob's your uncle. We'll dive into that and more coming up on ParkSyde Bright Side.
